messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-492 — Ensure a standing 'Backlog' catch-all Telegram topic once at boot: the routing target for epic-less tickets, reuse-or-create under a reserved subject id
What it solves: FOUNDATION SLICE of the BL-491 epic. Delivers the standing "Backlog" catch-all topic that BL-493
routes epic-less ticket events into. On its own it fires live (the boot ensure runs), so it is a
real behavioral slice, not a dark module.
First acceptance signal: Booting with no Backlog topic creates one under the reserved Backlog subject
Approval context: Foundation slice of the BL-491 topic-consolidation epic you already blessed at the plan level. This ticket's contract: a standing "Backlog" catch-all topic ensured once at boot under a new reserved subject id, reuse-or-create exactly like the Approvals/Recert standing topics, with the existing stan…
BL-492 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-492" (or "reject BL-492 <reason>") to act.
